metadata.name: SammaPix
metadata.description: Free browser-based image optimization tools. Compress, convert, resize, and enhance photos without uploading to any server.

guides.title: Compress Images Without Losing Quality
guides.description: Complete guide to lossy vs lossless compression, best quality settings per format, and practical workflow for optimizing images for web.

guides.title: Complete Guide to WebP Format
guides.description: Everything about WebP: file size advantages, browser compatibility, when to use it, and how to convert images.

guides.title: How to Rename Images for SEO with AI
guides.description: AI-powered image renaming transforms generic filenames (IMG_1234.jpg) into SEO-friendly names that rank in Google Image Search.

guides.title: Convert iPhone HEIC Photos to JPG Free
guides.description: Step-by-step guide to converting HEIC photos from iPhone to JPG or PNG without software or uploads.

guides.title: Remove EXIF Data to Protect Your Privacy
guides.description: Why EXIF data is a privacy risk, what information it contains (GPS, camera, timestamps), and how to remove it safely.

guides.title: Image Sizes for Social Media Platforms (2026)
guides.description: Current image dimensions for every social platform: Instagram (1:1, 4:5), Twitter (16:9), LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube, Pinterest.

guides.title: Organize Travel Photos by Country with GPS
guides.description: Use GPS EXIF data to automatically sort and organize travel photos by country without manual work.

tools.name: Compress
tools.description: Compress JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF up to 80% smaller without quality loss. Batch processing with ZIP download.

tools.name: WebP Converter
tools.description: Convert any image format to modern WebP format (25-34% smaller than JPEG). Batch conversion with ZIP download.

tools.name: HEIC Converter
tools.description: Convert iPhone HEIC photos to JPG or WebP. No upload limits, batch processing, browser-based.

tools.name: AI Rename
tools.description: AI generates SEO-optimized filenames and alt text using Google Gemini. Free tier: 10/day. Pro: 500+/day.

tools.name: EXIF Remover
tools.description: Strip GPS location data and all EXIF metadata from photos. 100% browser-based, zero uploads.

tools.name: Resize Images
tools.description: Resize images for social media platforms (Instagram, Twitter, LinkedIn, YouTube, TikTok, Pinterest). Batch processing with presets.

tools.name: Crop & Ratio
tools.description: Crop images to exact aspect ratios (1:1, 16:9, 4:3, 3:2, A4, custom). Preview before crop, batch processing.

tools.name: Film Filters
tools.description: 14 authentic film presets (Kodak, Fuji, Ilford) plus 8 SammaPix originals. Apply to single or batch photos.

tools.name: Watermark
tools.description: Batch watermark photos with text or logo. 9 positioning options, tiled patterns, font customization.

tools.name: Find Duplicates
tools.description: Find exact and near-duplicate photos using perceptual hashing (pHash). Organize large photo libraries.

tools.name: Sort by Location
tools.description: Sort travel photos by country using GPS EXIF data. Organize large libraries automatically.

tools.name: Photo Map
tools.description: Generate interactive map from travel photos with GPS coordinates. Visualize photo locations on Mapbox.

tools.name: Cull Photos
tools.description: Rate and cull photo shoots efficiently with 1-5 star rating. Keyboard shortcuts, export as ZIP.
